detailed_specs.Application: Used In Papermaking As A Sizing Agent
detailed_specs.Storage: Store In A Cool, Dry Place
detailed_specs.Safety Information: Avoid Contact With Eyes And Skin. Use Appropriate Protective Equipment.

description: Alkyl Ketene Dimer (AKD) Wax Emulsion is a high-performance, reactive neutral sizing agent engineered for the paper and paperboard industry. It chemically reacts with the hydroxyl groups of cellulose fibers to form a covalent bond, imparting excellent resistance against water, ink, and acidic liquid penetration. It operates in neutral-to-alkaline pH ranges, helping preserve paper strength and prevent aging.
features: Chemically bonds with cellulose fibers for superior sizing stability.
Significantly improves paper surface strength and sizing value (Cobb value).
Enhances surface smoothness, brightness, and high-fidelity printability.
Operates in alkaline/neutral papermaking environments, preventing fiber degradation.
Reduces dusting and fluffing during high-speed cutting and printing.
applications: Sizing agent in writing paper, printing paper, photocopy paper, and paperboard manufacturing.
